metadata.note: 补建说明：该文件为后续补建，用于记录 TUI validation gate 的机器可读状态；当前进度：Phase 7 保持 prepublish gate 对齐，并补充 rich metadata hardening 状态。

scope.tarballRootDist: public wrappers only; implementation modules are under dist/internal
scope.virtualTextPrimitives: Task 9 sparse index, page cache, source lookup, incubating layout bundle, and append invalidation landed
scope.genericRangeSidecar: Phase 4 incubating generic source range index landed; metadata remains inert and host-owned
scope.sourceFirstSearchSessions: Phase 5 incubating source-first search sessions landed; hits are source ranges with optional projection and no UI state
scope.selectionExtraction: Phase 6 incubating selection/extraction helpers landed; results are immutable source-first data with no clipboard or active selection state
scope.richMetadataHardening: Phase 7 internal rich span/raw-visible indexes, rich materialize option validation, and benchmark schema guardrails landed without expanding public exports
